Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor

Class FieldReplaceVisitor

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTWalker
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTVisitor
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.CreatingASTVisitor
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.FieldReplaceVisitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visitor
public class FieldReplaceVisitor extends CreatingASTVisitor
Replaces field references o.a by methodcalls o._a(). This is needed for unit test generation.
